x-enumeration-literals.name: AgricultureSector
x-enumeration-literals.description: This loan is intended for the agricultural sector

x-enumeration-literals.name: Basic
x-enumeration-literals.description: Current account for providing essential banking services for customers with a poor credit history. Usually with no cheque book or overdraft facility.

x-enumeration-literals.name: BenefitAndReward
x-enumeration-literals.description: Packaged PCA products offering various benefits and rewards

x-enumeration-literals.name: Business
x-enumeration-literals.description: The Loan product for small and medium sized businesses. A generic code which may be applied for any segments until restricted.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CreditInterest
x-enumeration-literals.description: PCA products offering high credit interest

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cashback
x-enumeration-literals.description: PCA products offering Cashback

x-enumeration-literals.name: FlexibleBusinessLoan
x-enumeration-literals.description: This Loan product is intended for group of customers wanting a  flexible business loan

x-enumeration-literals.name: FixedGroup
x-enumeration-literals.description: This loan product is intended for a group of customers fixed/defined by the bank. (e.g. members of a specific organisation belonging to the same category)

x-enumeration-literals.name: General
x-enumeration-literals.description: Current account for providing general banking services, usually with a cheque book and optional overdraft.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Graduate
x-enumeration-literals.description: Current account for University Graduates.

x-enumeration-literals.name: GovernmentScheme
x-enumeration-literals.description: This loan product is intended for participants in a particular Government scheme

x-enumeration-literals.name: Other
x-enumeration-literals.description: all the other PCA products that can’t be classified as any of the above product types

x-enumeration-literals.name: Overdraft
x-enumeration-literals.description: PCA products with favourable overdraft offering

x-enumeration-literals.name: Packaged
x-enumeration-literals.description: Packaged current account with multiple features, usually available for a fee. Can also include rewards

x-enumeration-literals.name: Premium
x-enumeration-literals.description: Premium current account with  features usually available for a fee. Can also include rewards

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reward
x-enumeration-literals.description: This product has reward features,

x-enumeration-literals.name: Student
x-enumeration-literals.description: Current account for Further Education Students usually with special interest rates and other features

x-enumeration-literals.name: YoungAdult
x-enumeration-literals.description: Current account for young adults - age range can vary.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Youth
x-enumeration-literals.description: Current account for a youth age range normally 11 to 18, usually teenagers with increasing responsibility given with age.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ClientAccount
x-enumeration-literals.description: Designed for client money held on account by organisations

x-enumeration-literals.name: Standard
x-enumeration-literals.description: For companies who are not eligible for the other account types

x-enumeration-literals.name: NonCommercialChaitiesClbSoc
x-enumeration-literals.description: Designed for third sector organisations e.g. Schools, Credit Unions, Charities, Clubs & Societies

x-enumeration-literals.name: NonCommercialPublicAuthGovt
x-enumeration-literals.description: Designed for public sector organisations e.g. Public Authorities and Government

x-enumeration-literals.name: Religious
x-enumeration-literals.description: Targets the needs of particular religious communities e.g. adheres to Shariah law.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SectorSpecific
x-enumeration-literals.description: Has aspects that target particular sectors e.g. Agricultural

x-enumeration-literals.name: Startup
x-enumeration-literals.description: Designed for startup companies

x-enumeration-literals.name: Switcher
x-enumeration-literals.description: Designed for companies that have switched accounts from another financial institution
